input_text: Orang kaum ni memang la, kerja pun tak reti tapi nak demand gaji tinggi. Patut la negara tak maju.
reason: Targets a specific ethnic group as incompetent workers and blames them for national stagnation. Clear communal hostility with dehumanizing stereotype.
suggested_rewrite: Isu produktiviti pekerja perlu ditangani melalui latihan dan pendidikan, bukan menyalahkan mana-mana kaum.

input_text: Meme ni memang tepat la. Kaum tu kalau nampak diskaun, sanggup pijak orang lain. Memang darah mereka tamak.
reason: Shares a humiliating meme reinforcing ethnic stereotypes about greed. Dehumanizes an entire community with the phrase 'darah mereka tamak'.
suggested_rewrite: Tak perlu kaitkan perangai individu dengan kaum tertentu. Setiap orang ada sikap berbeza.

input_text: Siapa yang kahwin luar kaum memang pengkhianat. Kita kena buang mereka dari komuniti kita.
reason: Calls for social exclusion of people who marry outside their community, labeling them as traitors. Discriminatory call to ostracize.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan campur adalah pilihan peribadi. Kita patut menghormati keputusan setiap individu.

input_text: Awas! Kedai kaum X kat Cheras tu semua scam. Kawan aku kena tipu kerja sana. Jangan apply kerja dengan bangsa ni.
reason: Spreads unverified job scam warning tied to an entire ethnic group's businesses. Generalizes criminal behavior to a race.
suggested_rewrite: Kawan saya pernah ditipu majikan di Cheras. Sila buat semakan latar belakang sebelum terima tawaran kerja.

input_text: Jom semua bagi 1 star kat restoran tu. Owner dia yang cakap besar pasal kaum kita. Kita tunjuk kuasa kita.
reason: Encourages coordinated mass negative reviews as retaliation in an ethnic dispute. Vigilante mob action targeting a business.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada isu dengan restoran, buat aduan rasmi kepada pihak berkuasa atau KPDNHEP.

input_text: Tengok plate number WKJ 3321, kereta Vios putih. Ni orang yang kacau anak perempuan aku. Tolong sebarkan, biar semua orang tahu.
reason: Publicly posts a car plate number with unverified accusation of harassment, encouraging public vigilantism and exposing personal information.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anak anda diganggu, buat laporan polis segera. Jangan sebarkan maklumat peribadi secara terbuka.

input_text: Perempuan pakai tudung tapi perangai macam setan. Tutup kepala je tapi hati busuk. Hipokrit semua.
reason: Aggressively mocks hijab-wearing women, calling them hypocrites and comparing them to devils. Attacks religious attire and character.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan nilai seseorang berdasarkan pakaian mereka. Perangai individu bukan cerminan seluruh komuniti.

input_text: Cerita viral pasal kaum tu serang peniaga Melayu di pasar malam memang betul. Kawan aku sendiri nampak. Kita kena berjaga-jaga.
reason: Amplifies unverified communal conflict story as fact, creating fear between ethnic groups. Uses anecdotal claim to validate rumor.
suggested_rewrite: Cerita viral tentang insiden di pasar malam belum disahkan. Tunggu pengesahan pihak berkuasa sebelum sebarkan.

input_text: Kita semua patut boikot kedai mereka. Beli dari kaum sendiri je. Duit kita jangan masuk poket bangsa lain.
reason: Calls for ethnically-motivated economic boycott. 'We should all' discriminatory action promoting racial economic segregation.
suggested_rewrite: Sokong perniagaan tempatan tanpa mengira kaum. Ekonomi negara bergantung kepada kerjasama semua rakyat.

input_text: Share meme ni. Kaum tu kalau masuk kedai mesti tawar sampai peniaga menangis. Memang DNA kedekut.
reason: Shares humiliating meme reinforcing ethnic stereotype about stinginess. Uses dehumanizing language 'DNA kedekut' to characterize an entire race.
suggested_rewrite: Menawar harga adalah amalan biasa semua orang. Jangan kaitkan dengan kaum tertentu.

input_text: Perempuan kaum ni memang semua macam tu. Kahwin luar kaum lepas tu nak harap duit mak bapak. Tak ada maruah.
reason: Targets women of a specific ethnic group who marry outside their community, attacking their dignity and character. Sexist and communal hostility combined.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan adalah pilihan peribadi. Jangan menghakimi wanita berdasarkan keputusan peribadi mereka.

input_text: Kita semua patut tolak calon dari kaum tu dalam PRU. Mereka tak pernah jaga kepentingan kita.
reason: Calls for collective rejection of election candidates based on ethnicity. Discriminatory 'we should all' action undermining democratic participation.
suggested_rewrite: Pilih calon PRU berdasarkan manifesto dan rekod prestasi, bukan berdasarkan kaum.

input_text: Aku dah bosan tengok bangsa ni control semua bisnes. Kita patut semua bersatu halau mereka dari kawasan kita.
reason: Expresses hostility toward an ethnic group's business presence and calls for collective action to drive them out. Near-incitement level exclusion.
suggested_rewrite: Isu monopoli perniagaan perlu ditangani melalui dasar ekonomi yang adil, bukan tindakan diskriminasi.

input_text: Budak sekolah kaum tu memang pemalas. Tengok result SPM pun tahu la. Jangan bagi peluang lebih pada mereka.
reason: Stereotypes an entire ethnic group's students as lazy based on exam results and advocates denying them opportunities. Discriminatory and dehumanizing.
suggested_rewrite: Pencapaian akademik bergantung kepada banyak faktor. Semua pelajar layak mendapat sokongan pendidikan yang sama.

input_text: Korang tau tak, kawasan tu dah jadi sarang penjenayah sebab banyak sangat kaum tu duduk sana. Elakkan kawasan tu.
reason: Links an ethnic group's presence to crime without evidence, spreading dangerous misinformation and fueling communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Jika kawasan itu mempunyai isu keselamatan, laporkan kepada polis. Jangan kaitkan jenayah dengan kaum tertentu.

input_text: Anak sesiapa yang kahwin dengan kaum tu, buang dari wasiat. Kita patut semua buat macam ni untuk jaga darah kita.
reason: Advocates disinheriting children who marry outside their ethnic group and calls for collective discriminatory action. Racial purity rhetoric.
suggested_rewrite: Keputusan perkahwinan adalah hak peribadi. Hubungan keluarga tidak sepatutnya terjejas oleh pilihan pasangan.

input_text: Meme baru: kaum tu kalau jumpa buffet, ambil semua tapi makan sikit je. Memang perangai bangsa ni dari dulu.
reason: Creates and shares humiliating meme stereotyping an ethnic group's behavior at buffets. Attributes negative trait to an entire race.
suggested_rewrite: Pembaziran makanan adalah isu individu, bukan kaum. Jangan kaitkan perangai seseorang dengan bangsa mereka.

input_text: Kawan-kawan, jangan hantar anak ke sekolah tu. Penuh dengan budak kaum tu, nanti anak kita ikut perangai buruk mereka.
reason: Calls for avoiding a school due to ethnic composition, implying an entire group has bad behavior that will corrupt others. Discriminatory segregation advocacy.
suggested_rewrite: Pilih sekolah berdasarkan kualiti pendidikan dan kemudahan, bukan komposisi kaum pelajar.

input_text: Dengar cerita, kaum tu dah mula beli tanah banyak kat kampung kita. Kita kena bersatu halang mereka sebelum terlambat.
reason: Spreads unverified claim about ethnic land acquisition to stoke fear and calls for collective resistance against an ethnic group.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pemilikan tanah perlu ditangani melalui saluran undang-undang. Jangan sebarkan dakwaan tanpa bukti.

input_text: Lelaki kaum tu memang gatal. Asyik kacau perempuan kaum lain. Kita patut ajar mereka satu pengajaran.
reason: Stereotypes men of a specific ethnic group as sexual harassers and hints at collective retaliation. Combines communal hostility with vigilante undertone.
suggested_rewrite: Gangguan seksual adalah jenayah yang perlu dilaporkan kepada polis, tanpa mengira kaum pelaku.

input_text: Seluar pendek pun nak masuk masjid. Kaum tu memang tak hormat agama orang lain. Patut dihalau keluar.
reason: Uses a dress code issue to attack an entire ethnic group as disrespectful to religion and calls for them to be expelled. Religious-ethnic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Pelawat tempat ibadat perlu menghormati kod pakaian. Pihak pengurusan boleh menyediakan panduan yang jelas.

input_text: Lepas ni jangan beli dari kedai kaum tu. Duit kita bagi mereka, mereka beli undi. Kita semua patut sedar.
reason: Calls for ethnic boycott based on unverified claim about vote-buying. Spreads misinformation to justify discriminatory action.
suggested_rewrite: Dakwaan pembelian undi perlu dilaporkan kepada SPR. Jangan kaitkan aktiviti jenayah dengan kaum tertentu.

input_text: Memang betul la orang cakap, kaum tu kalau bagi jawatan tinggi mesti rasuah. Dah banyak kes terbukti.
reason: Falsely attributes corruption to an entire ethnic group in leadership positions. Spreads dangerous stereotype as though it is proven fact.
suggested_rewrite: Rasuah adalah isu individu, bukan kaum. Semua pemimpin perlu dipertanggungjawabkan tanpa mengira latar belakang.

input_text: Plate number HWD 8876, Honda City hitam. Driver ni yang langgar kucing kat taman aku. Tolong viralkan supaya semua orang kenal muka dia.
reason: Exposes vehicle details with unverified accusation and asks for public shaming. Privacy violation combined with vigilantism.
suggested_rewrite: Jika kenderaan melanggar haiwan di kawasan anda, buat laporan polis dengan butiran yang ada.

input_text: Orang pakai kopiah tu semua extreme la. Tengok je muka diorang pun dah macam nak buat benda tak baik.
reason: Aggressively profiles people wearing religious headgear as extremists based on appearance. Religious stereotyping and dehumanization.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan menilai seseorang berdasarkan pakaian agama mereka. Penampilan bukan petunjuk niat seseorang.

input_text: Kita semua patut report akaun media sosial kaum tu yang promote budaya asing. Jangan bagi mereka ruang.
reason: Calls for mass reporting of social media accounts belonging to a specific ethnic group. Collective discriminatory action to suppress cultural expression.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia kaya dengan pelbagai budaya. Jika kandungan melanggar undang-undang, report secara individu dengan alasan yang tepat.

input_text: Viral: Pergaduhan antara kaum Melayu dan India di pasar Sentul! Video menunjukkan keadaan sangat teruk. Ini baru permulaan.
reason: Amplifies unverified communal conflict with ominous warning 'ini baru permulaan', designed to inflame racial tensions.
suggested_rewrite: Ada laporan insiden di pasar Sentul. Tunggu pengesahan pihak berkuasa. Jangan sebarkan maklumat yang belum disahkan.

input_text: Aku nak share nombor telefon owner kedai tu. 012-XXXXXXX. Dia yang hina kaum kita. Korang tau apa nak buat.
reason: Shares a business owner's phone number for targeted harassment in an ethnic dispute. Privacy exposure with vigilantism implications.
suggested_rewrite: Jika seseorang menghina kaum anda, buat laporan polis. Jangan sebarkan maklumat peribadi orang lain.

input_text: Kaum tu memang pandai main mangsa. Sikit-sikit cry racism. Padahal mereka yang paling racist.
reason: Dismisses an ethnic group's discrimination claims and accuses them of being the real racists. Gaslighting combined with communal targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Tuduhan rasisme perlu diteliti secara adil. Setiap aduan patut dilayan dengan serius tanpa prasangka.

input_text: Dari kecik lagi memang kaum ni diajar untuk tipu orang lain. Tengok mak bapak diorang pun macam tu. Memang adat mereka.
reason: Claims an entire ethnic group is culturally taught to deceive others from childhood. Deeply dehumanizing generalization attacking a community's values.
suggested_rewrite: Penipuan adalah isu individu. Jangan kaitkan perangai buruk seseorang dengan budaya atau kaum mereka.

input_text: Orang yang pakai turban tu semua bau busuk. Setiap kali naik LRT dekat diorang, memang tak tahan.
reason: Attacks turban-wearing individuals with degrading body-shaming stereotypes. Targets religious attire wearers for humiliation.
suggested_rewrite: Kebersihan adalah tanggungjawab peribadi setiap individu. Jangan kaitkan dengan pakaian agama tertentu.

input_text: Jom kita semua unfollow dan report semua bisnes online yang dijalankan oleh kaum tu. Biar mereka rasa.
reason: Organizes collective harassment of online businesses based on the owner's ethnicity. Coordinated discriminatory economic attack.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada isu dengan sesuatu perniagaan, buat aduan rasmi. Jangan sasarkan perniagaan berdasarkan kaum pemilik.

input_text: Restoran kaum tu kotor gila. Dah la haram, masih nak operate kat kawasan kita. Kita patut buat petisyen tutup semua.
reason: Targets restaurants of a specific ethnic group with unverified hygiene and halal claims, calling for collective action to shut them down.
suggested_rewrite: Isu kebersihan restoran boleh dilaporkan kepada KPDNHEP. Jangan kaitkan standard kebersihan dengan kaum pemilik.

input_text: Kalau kaum tu nak duduk Malaysia, kena ikut cara kita. Tak suka, balik negara asal. Kita semua setuju kan?
reason: Frames ethnic minorities as foreigners who must assimilate or leave. 'We should all agree' discriminatory rhetoric questioning belonging.
suggested_rewrite: Semua rakyat Malaysia berhak mengekalkan budaya masing-masing. Perpaduan dibina melalui saling menghormati.

input_text: Ini alamat rumah pakcik yang buat bising waktu solat. No 23 Jalan Kenanga. Sesiapa nak pergi tegur, silakan.
reason: Publicly shares a home address encouraging confrontation over a noise dispute during prayer time. Doxxing with vigilantism risk.
suggested_rewrite: Jika jiran buat bising, bincang secara baik atau hubungi pihak berkuasa tempatan untuk mediasi.

input_text: These people from that race ah, all same one. Cannot trust them in business. Every deal sure got hidden charges. We all know la.
reason: Blanket characterization of an entire race as untrustworthy in business dealings. Reinforces harmful ethnic stereotypes with 'we all know' consensus-building.
suggested_rewrite: Always review business contracts carefully regardless of who you deal with. Hidden charges are an individual malpractice issue, not a racial trait.

input_text: Share this meme everyone! It perfectly shows how that race always cuts queue. It's literally in their culture to be rude.
reason: Encourages sharing a humiliating meme that attributes rudeness to an ethnic group's culture. Viral dehumanization attempt.
suggested_rewrite: Queue-cutting is annoying regardless of who does it. Don't attribute individual rudeness to any cultural or ethnic group.

input_text: Anyone who marries outside our race is a disgrace. We should all cut ties with them. Our bloodline must remain pure.
reason: Advocates social ostracism of interracial couples using racial purity language. Collective discriminatory call to action.
suggested_rewrite: Interracial marriage is a personal choice protected by law. Respect individuals' right to choose their life partners.

input_text: WARNING: Don't apply for jobs at businesses owned by that race in Klang Valley. My friend got scammed. They are all like that.
reason: Spreads fake job scam warning targeting an entire ethnic group's businesses across a region. Anecdotal evidence used to smear a race.
suggested_rewrite: If you've been scammed by an employer, report it to the Labour Department. Always verify job offers regardless of the employer's background.

input_text: Let's all give 1-star reviews to that shop in Bangsar. The owner insulted our community and we need to teach him a lesson.
reason: Organizes coordinated review bombing of a business as ethnic retaliation. Vigilante mob action disguised as consumer feedback.
suggested_rewrite: If a business owner made offensive remarks, file a formal complaint with the relevant authorities instead of coordinated retaliation.

input_text: Plate number VAG 5519 white Myvi. This is the person who harassed my sister near the temple. Everyone please share and watch out.
reason: Publicly exposes vehicle information with unverified harassment accusation near a religious site. Privacy violation enabling vigilantism.
suggested_rewrite: If your sister was harassed, please lodge a police report immediately. Do not share personal vehicle information publicly.

input_text: Women wearing hijab and then going to clubs at night. Such hypocrites. All of them are the same, using religion as a cover.
reason: Aggressively mocks hijab-wearing women and generalizes all of them as hypocrites. Attacks religious practice and personal character.
suggested_rewrite: It's not appropriate to judge anyone's personal choices or religious practice. Each person's journey with faith is individual.

input_text: BREAKING: Malay and Chinese groups clashed at Petaling Street last night. Heard many injured. This is what happens when they take over our areas.
reason: Amplifies unverified communal clash story as breaking news with inflammatory framing that assigns blame and territorial ownership to ethnic groups.
suggested_rewrite: There are unverified reports of an incident at Petaling Street. Wait for official police statements before sharing. Do not speculate on ethnic dimensions.

input_text: We should all refuse to rent our properties to that race. They always damage the place and never pay on time. Pass it on.
reason: Calls for collective housing discrimination against a racial group based on stereotypes. 'We should all' discriminatory action with potential legal implications.
suggested_rewrite: Tenant selection should be based on creditworthiness and references, not race. Racial discrimination in housing is illegal.

input_text: Those Sikh turbans look so ridiculous in the office. How can anyone take them seriously? Corporate Malaysia needs a dress code that bans all that.
reason: Mocks Sikh religious headgear and calls for corporate policies to ban religious attire. Targets a specific religious group's identity.
suggested_rewrite: Workplaces should respect religious attire as part of diversity. Professional competence is not determined by what someone wears.

input_text: Everyone knows that community only hires their own kind. We should all do the same. Don't give them any jobs in our companies.
reason: Accuses an ethnic group of exclusionary hiring and advocates reciprocal racial discrimination. 'We should all' call for discriminatory employment practices.
suggested_rewrite: Hiring should be based on qualifications and merit. Workplace diversity benefits all businesses and communities.

input_text: Someone sent me this meme about how that race drives. So accurate LOL. They literally have no road sense, it's genetic.
reason: Shares a humiliating driving meme attributed to a racial group and claims the trait is genetic. Pseudo-scientific racial stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Bad driving is not related to race or genetics. Road safety education benefits everyone.

input_text: If you see any of their temples being built in our neighbourhood, we should all sign a petition to stop it. This is our area.
reason: Calls for collective action to prevent a religious group from building temples, framing it as territorial ethnic control. Religious exclusion.
suggested_rewrite: Construction of religious buildings follows local council zoning laws. Concerns should be raised through proper municipal channels.

input_text: That whole race is just money-minded. They'd sell their own grandmother for profit. Don't trust any of them with your money.
reason: Dehumanizing characterization of an entire race as greedy and untrustworthy. Extreme negative stereotype generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Trustworthiness in financial dealings is an individual trait. Do your due diligence with anyone you do business with.

input_text: Heard from reliable source that group of Indians attacked Malay stall owners in Brickfields. Share before they cover it up!
reason: Spreads unverified claim of ethnic attack with urgency to share before supposed cover-up. Designed to inflame communal tensions.
suggested_rewrite: Unverified claims about communal incidents should not be shared. Wait for official reports from police before drawing conclusions.

input_text: We should all boycott Deepavali sales. Why should we support their festivals when they don't support ours? Time to take a stand.
reason: Calls for boycotting a Hindu festival's commercial activity as ethnic retaliation. Weaponizes cultural celebrations for communal division.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's diverse festivals are opportunities for unity. Supporting each other's celebrations strengthens the national fabric.

input_text: Car plate BKE 2247, black Axia. This Chinese uncle almost hit my kid near the school. Chinese drivers all like that. Please share.
reason: Exposes vehicle details with unverified accusation while racializing the incident. Combines privacy violation with ethnic stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: If a vehicle endangered your child near a school, report the licence plate to the police. Road safety is not a racial issue.

input_text: These pork-eating people have no shame setting up stalls near our surau. We should all complain to the council until they remove them.
reason: Dehumanizes a group by dietary practice and calls for collective action to remove their businesses near a Muslim prayer hall. Religious hostility.
suggested_rewrite: If there are concerns about food stall placement near a surau, raise them with the local council through proper channels.

input_text: My company only hires Malays now after bad experience with that race. We should all protect our businesses from them.
reason: Openly admits and advocates racial discrimination in hiring. Calls for others to join in exclusionary employment practices.
suggested_rewrite: Hiring should be based on qualifications and performance. Discriminatory hiring practices are unethical and may violate employment law.

input_text: Look at this meme LOL. So true that every time their festivals come, the whole neighbourhood smells terrible. They have no consideration.
reason: Mocks religious festivals through humiliating meme about smell, dehumanizing cultural practices and those who celebrate them.
suggested_rewrite: Festival practices may involve different scents. If you have concerns, talk to your neighbours respectfully about any issues.

input_text: We should all stop sending our kids to schools where that race is the majority. They'll pick up bad habits and bad values.
reason: Advocates ethnic segregation in education by claiming a racial group has bad values that are contagious. Discriminatory collective action call.
suggested_rewrite: Choose schools based on educational quality, not racial composition. Diverse environments help children develop empathy and understanding.

input_text: Alert everyone: Don't hire maids from that race. My neighbour's one stole jewellery. They're all thieves by nature.
reason: Spreads ethnic stereotype about domestic workers being thieves based on one anecdote. Dangerous generalization affecting employment of an ethnic group.
suggested_rewrite: If a domestic worker stole from your neighbour, report it to the police. Always do background checks through licensed agencies regardless of nationality.

input_text: These people wearing the red dot on forehead look so primitive. How can modern Malaysia still have people following such backward practices?
reason: Mocks the bindi/pottu as primitive and backward, attacking Hindu religious practice and those who observe it. Religious degradation.
suggested_rewrite: Religious and cultural symbols like the bindi carry deep significance. Respect diverse cultural practices in multicultural Malaysia.

input_text: That race's wedding so noisy and long. Block the whole road for what. We should all complain to council to ban their outdoor weddings.
reason: Targets a specific ethnic group's wedding customs and calls for collective action to ban their cultural practices. Cultural intolerance dressed as civic complaint.
suggested_rewrite: If outdoor events cause noise or traffic issues, raise concerns with the local council. Cultural celebrations are part of Malaysian diversity.

input_text: That community's food stalls always so unhygienic. Council should shut them all down. We should mass complaint until action is taken.
reason: Targets a community's food businesses with hygiene generalizations and calls for collective action to shut them all down. Discriminatory mob pressure.
suggested_rewrite: Food hygiene standards apply to all vendors. Report specific violations to the health department rather than targeting a community.

input_text: 这种族的人做生意就是会骗人，大家千万别去他们的店买东西。我们华人要团结抵制。
reason: Characterizes another race as business cheats and calls for ethnic solidarity in boycotting them. Collective discriminatory economic action.
suggested_rewrite: 遇到商业欺诈应该向消费者协会投诉。不应该把个人行为归咎于整个种族。

input_text: 分享这个表情包，太搞笑了！就是说那个种族的人吃自助餐的样子，真的超级准确。他们就是这种素质。
reason: Shares humiliating meme about an ethnic group's behavior at buffets, attributing it to their inherent quality as a people.
suggested_rewrite: 用餐礼仪是个人修养问题，不应该用来嘲笑任何种族。请不要分享带有种族歧视的内容。

input_text: 谁跟外族结婚就是背叛自己的种族。我们大家都应该跟这种人断绝来往，保持血统纯正。
reason: Labels interracial marriage as racial betrayal and calls for collective ostracism. Blood purity rhetoric with discriminatory social exclusion.
suggested_rewrite: 异族通婚是个人自由和权利。我们应该尊重每个人选择伴侣的决定。

input_text: 小心！别去那个种族开的公司应聘。朋友去了被骗了三个月工资。他们的人全都一样的。
reason: Spreads fake job scam warning targeting businesses of a specific race. One anecdote used to condemn an entire ethnic group.
suggested_rewrite: 如果朋友遇到工资欺诈，应向劳工部门举报。求职时对所有公司都要做好背景调查。

input_text: 大家一起去给那家餐厅刷一星差评！老板侮辱了我们华人。让他生意做不下去。
reason: Organizes mass review bombing of a restaurant as ethnic retaliation. Coordinated mob action to destroy a business.
suggested_rewrite: 如果餐厅老板有歧视行为，可以向相关部门投诉。不要用刷差评来报复。

input_text: 车牌号PKR 8832，银色Proton Saga。这个马来人在学校门口骚扰小孩。大家帮忙转发让所有人认识他。
reason: Exposes vehicle details with unverified child harassment accusation while racializing the suspect. Privacy violation combined with ethnic targeting and vigilantism.
suggested_rewrite: 如果有人在学校附近骚扰儿童，请立即报警。不要在网上公开个人信息。

input_text: 戴头巾的女人看起来真的很可笑。都什么年代了还包着头，跟不上时代。这种宗教太落后了。
reason: Mocks hijab as laughable and backward, attacking Muslim women's religious practice and calling the religion outdated. Religious degradation.
suggested_rewrite: 宗教服饰是个人信仰的表达，应该被尊重。不同的文化有不同的穿着传统。

input_text: 听说巴生那边马来人和印度人又打起来了，好几个人受伤。这种事迟早会蔓延到我们这里。大家要小心。
reason: Amplifies unverified communal violence story and warns it will spread, designed to create ethnic fear and division.
suggested_rewrite: 关于巴生的传闻尚未经证实。请等待官方消息，不要传播未经验证的信息。

input_text: 我们小区的房子千万别卖给那个种族的人。一旦他们搬进来，房价就会跌。大家要互相提醒。
reason: Calls for collective housing discrimination against an ethnic group, claiming their presence decreases property values. Discriminatory coordination.
suggested_rewrite: 房产价值取决于很多因素。基于种族的住房歧视是不道德的，也可能违法。

input_text: 那个种族的男人就是好色。我们的女孩子要远离他们。大家都应该教育自己的女儿。
reason: Stereotypes men of an entire ethnic group as lecherous and calls for collective avoidance. Sexualized racial profiling.
suggested_rewrite: 个人安全意识很重要，但不应该基于种族来判断一个人的品格。

input_text: 看到这个族群在我们清真寺附近开酒吧，真的很不尊重。我们应该联合起来把它关掉。
reason: Frames a business near a mosque as ethnic-religious disrespect and calls for collective action to shut it down. Business licensing is a legal matter being weaponized for communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: 如果对清真寺附近的商业活动有疑虑，可以向地方议会提出正式投诉。

input_text: 这帮人做表情包嘲笑我们华人的节日传统，我们也做一些嘲笑他们的。以牙还牙！大家转发起来。
reason: Calls for creating and sharing retaliatory humiliating memes targeting another ethnic group's cultural practices. Escalatory tit-for-tat communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: 嘲笑任何文化传统都是不对的。如果看到歧视性内容，可以举报而不是以同样方式回击。

input_text: 那些戴着turban的人在办公室里看起来太奇怪了。公司应该禁止这种宗教装束，影响专业形象。
reason: Mocks Sikh turbans in professional settings and advocates banning religious attire in offices. Religious intolerance disguised as professionalism concern.
suggested_rewrite: 工作场所应该包容不同的宗教服饰。专业能力不应该以穿着来判断。

input_text: 我们华人都不应该租房子给那个种族的人。上次租给他们，房子被搞得一塌糊涂。
reason: Advocates racial discrimination in property rental based on one bad experience generalized to a whole race. Collective discriminatory call.
suggested_rewrite: 租房时应该根据租客的信用记录和推荐信来评估，而不是根据种族。

input_text: 车牌号VBK 1198，红色Honda City。这个人在巴刹偷东西被我抓到。大家帮忙转发，让他无处可藏。
reason: Publicly shares vehicle details with unverified theft accusation, asking for viral sharing to ensure the person 'has nowhere to hide'. Doxxing and vigilantism.
suggested_rewrite: 如果目睹偷窃行为，请立即报警。不要在网上公开个人车牌信息进行公审。

input_text: அந்த இனத்தவர் எல்லாரும் ஒரே மாதிரிதான். வியாபாரத்தில் ஏமாத்துவாங்க. நம்ம ஆளுங்ககிட்ட மட்டும் வாங்குங்க.
reason: Brands an entire ethnic group as business cheats and calls for buying only from own community. Discriminatory economic boycott call in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: வியாபாரத்தில் ஏமாற்றம் தனிநபர் பிரச்சனை. எந்த இனத்தையும் பொதுவாக குற்றம் சாட்டக்கூடாது.

input_text: இந்த meme பாருங்க, அந்த இனத்தவர் queue-ல நிக்கிற மாதிரி. 100% accurate. அவங்க culture-ல discipline இல்ல.
reason: Shares humiliating meme about an ethnic group's queuing behavior and claims their culture lacks discipline. Cultural dehumanization.
suggested_rewrite: ஒழுங்கு என்பது தனிநபர் பழக்கம். ஒரு இனத்தின் கலாச்சாரத்தை இழிவுபடுத்த வேண்டாம்.

input_text: வேற இனத்தவரை கல்யாணம் பண்ணினா குடும்பத்திலிருந்து விரட்டணும். நம்ம எல்லாரும் இப்படிதான் செய்யணும்.
reason: Calls for expelling family members who marry outside the community. Collective discriminatory action advocacy in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: திருமணம் தனிப்பட்ட முடிவு. குடும்ப உறவுகள் திருமண தேர்வால் பாதிக்கப்படக்கூடாது.

input_text: எச்சரிக்கை: அந்த இனத்தவர் கடையில வேலைக்கு போகாதீங்க. என் நண்பன் salary ஏமாந்தான். அவங்க எல்லாரும் இப்படிதான்.
reason: Spreads fake job scam warning targeting all businesses of a specific race based on one friend's experience. Ethnic business defamation.
suggested_rewrite: ஊதிய மோசடி நடந்தால் தொழிலாளர் துறையில் புகார் செய்யுங்கள். எல்லா நிறுவனங்களையும் சரிபாருங்கள்.

input_text: அந்த கடைக்கு எல்லாரும் 1 star review போடுங்க. owner நம்ம சமூகத்தை அவமானப்படுத்தினான். பாடம் கற்பிக்கணும்.
reason: Organizes mass review bombing as ethnic retaliation against a business. Coordinated vigilante mob action in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: கடை உரிமையாளர் தவறு செய்தால் உரிய அதிகாரிகளிடம் புகார் செய்யுங்கள். கூட்டாக review bombing செய்யாதீர்கள்.

input_text: Car number WQS 4421, வெள்ள Viva. இந்த ஆள் என் பொண்ணை stalk பண்றான். எல்லாரும் share பண்ணுங்க, ஜாக்கிரதை.
reason: Publicly shares vehicle number with unverified stalking accusation asking everyone to share. Privacy violation enabling vigilantism.
suggested_rewrite: Stalking நடந்தால் உடனடியாக போலீஸில் புகார் செய்யுங்கள். தனிப்பட்ட தகவல்களை பொதுவில் பகிர வேண்டாம்.

input_text: தலையில் துணி கட்டிக்கிட்டு வர்ற பெண்கள் எல்லாரும் backward-ன்னு தெரியுது. இது என்ன காலம்? மத அடிமைத்தனம்.
reason: Mocks women wearing religious head coverings as backward and calls religious practice slavery. Attacks religious attire and faith.
suggested_rewrite: மத உடை அணிவது தனிப்பட்ட நம்பிக்கை சார்ந்தது. மற்றவர்களின் மத நடைமுறைகளை மதிக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: கேள்விப்பட்டேன் PJ-ல மலாய் பையன்கள் இந்தியன் கடையை உடைச்சாங்களாம். Video viral ஆகுது. இது தொடக்கம்தான்.
reason: Amplifies unverified communal violence rumor with ominous 'this is just the beginning' warning designed to inflame ethnic tensions.
suggested_rewrite: PJ-ல நடந்ததாக சொல்லப்படும் சம்பவம் உறுதிப்படுத்தப்படவில்லை. அதிகாரப்பூர்வ தகவலுக்கு காத்திருங்கள்.

input_text: நம்ம எல்லாரும் சேர்ந்து அந்த இனத்தவர் temple கட்டுறதை தடுக்கணும். நம்ம area-ல அவங்களுக்கு இடம் கொடுக்க வேண்டாம்.
reason: Calls for collective action to prevent religious temple construction by another community. Religious exclusion and territorial ethnic claim.
suggested_rewrite: கோவில் கட்டுமானம் உள்ளூர் அதிகாரிகளின் அனுமதி சார்ந்தது. சட்ட வழிமுறைகள் மூலம் கருத்துக்களை தெரிவிக்கலாம்.

input_text: அந்த மதத்தைப் பின்பற்றுபவர்கள் எல்லாரும் extreme. இந்த நாட்டுக்கு ஆபத்து. நாம எல்லாரும் எச்சரிக்கையா இருக்கணும்.
reason: Labels all followers of a religion as extremists dangerous to the nation. Religious profiling with communal fear-mongering in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: எந்த மதத்தையும் பொதுவாக extreme என்று சொல்வது தவறு. தீவிரவாதம் தனிநபர் பிரச்சனை, மதம் அல்ல.

input_text: Bro that race punya meme ni spot on la. Every time CNY mesti judi habis duit then blame economy. Confirm genetic trait ni.
reason: Shares humiliating meme stereotyping Chinese Malaysians as gamblers and pseudo-scientifically claims it's genetic. Mixed-language ethnic degradation.
suggested_rewrite: Perjudian adalah isu individu, bukan ciri kaum. Jangan kaitkan aktiviti peribadi dengan keseluruhan etnik.

input_text: Eh kalau anak korang kahwin dengan bangsa lain, jangan harap nak datang family gathering. We all should set this rule bro.
reason: Advocates family exclusion of those who marry outside the race and pushes for it as a collective community rule. Discriminatory social norm enforcement.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan campur adalah hak peribadi. Family gathering sepatutnya untuk semua ahli keluarga tanpa diskriminasi.

input_text: Bro jangan apply kerja kat company bangsa tu la. Confirm kena exploit. My cousin kena before. Semua sama one their business people.
reason: Spreads ethnic-targeted job warning based on anecdotal evidence. Generalizes exploitation to all business owners of a race.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau cousin kena exploit, report to Labour Department. Always verify company background before accepting any job offer.

input_text: Woi semua orang bagi bad review kat Google Maps untuk kedai dia. Dia yang cakap kaum kita bodoh. Let's teach him a lesson la.
reason: Calls for mass negative reviews as ethnic retaliation. Coordinated harassment disguised as consumer action, mixed Malay-English.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau ada orang menghina kaum anda, buat laporan polis or report ke MCMC. Jangan organize mass review bombing.

input_text: Plate JQK 7734 silver Vios. This macha yang kacau my wife kat parking lot. Please share semua group biar viral. Dia orang India from that area confirm.
reason: Exposes vehicle details with unverified harassment claim while racially profiling the accused. Privacy violation combined with ethnic targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau isteri anda diganggu, pergi buat police report segera. Jangan share personal info online or make racial assumptions.

input_text: Bro perempuan pakai tudung labuh tu semua cover je. Belakang tabir lagi liar dari orang biasa. Semua hypocrite I tell you.
reason: Aggressively mocks women in long hijab as secretly immoral hypocrites. Attacks religious attire and character of observant Muslim women.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan judge seseorang based on pakaian agama mereka. Kehidupan peribadi orang lain bukan urusan kita.

input_text: Korang dengar tak, kat Puchong ada fight between Malay and Chinese group semalam. Video tu confirm real. This country dah nak pecah la bro.
reason: Amplifies unverified ethnic clash story and declares the country is about to break apart. Catastrophizing to inflame communal fears.
suggested_rewrite: Rumours pasal fight kat Puchong belum disahkan. Tunggu official statement dari polis. Jangan sebarkan unverified claims.

input_text: We should all tarik balik anak dari sekolah tu bro. Full of bangsa tu punya budak. Nanti anak kita ikut perangai buruk diorang.
reason: Calls for collectively withdrawing children from schools based on ethnic composition, claiming another race corrupts children. Segregation advocacy.
suggested_rewrite: Pilih sekolah based on quality of education. Diverse school environment helps children develop understanding and respect.

input_text: Alamat dia kat Taman Sentosa no 15 bro. Ni la orang yang post benda rasis pasal kaum kita. Jom kita semua pergi confront dia.
reason: Shares home address and calls for group confrontation over alleged racist post. Doxxing with explicit vigilantism coordination.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau ada posting rasis, report to MCMC or polis. Jangan share alamat orang lain or plan confrontation.

input_text: I tell you la bro, semua kedai kaum tu kat Klang memang scam. Don't trust la. Kita should boycott together.
reason: Labels all businesses of an ethnic group in a region as scams and calls for collective boycott. Ethnic economic discrimination based on misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau kena scam, report ke pihak berkuasa. Jangan generalise semua kedai based on kaum pemilik.

input_text: Bro tengok la orang pakai dhoti masuk shopping mall. So embarrassing for Malaysia. Kita patut ban this kind of clothing in public la.
reason: Mocks traditional Indian attire in public spaces and calls for banning it. Cultural humiliation targeting a community's traditional dress.
suggested_rewrite: Traditional attire is part of Malaysia's cultural diversity. Setiap orang berhak memakai pakaian tradisional mereka di tempat awam.

input_text: Ni phone number owner kedai tu 016-XXXXXXX. Dia yang refuse serve orang Melayu. Everyone call and harass dia sampai dia tutup kedai.
reason: Shares business owner's phone number and explicitly calls for harassment campaign. Doxxing with coordinated harassment instruction.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau ada diskriminasi in service, report ke KPDNHEP. Jangan share private info or encourage harassment.

input_text: All of us should demand that company fire that kaum punya staff yang post pasal kita. Let's flood their inbox bro.
reason: Organizes mass pressure campaign to get someone fired based on ethnic dispute. Coordinated harassment targeting employment.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau ada isu dengan posting seseorang, report melalui saluran rasmi. Jangan organize mass campaign to get someone fired.

input_text: Kat Subang Jaya ni dah macam negara China. Signboard pun semua Mandarin. Kita semua patut complain until they change or tutup kedai.
reason: Complains about Chinese signage with hostile territorial framing and calls for collective action to force business changes or closures.
suggested_rewrite: Signage regulations should follow local council guidelines. Kalau ada isu, report formally to DBKL. Malaysia is multilingual.

input_text: Perasan tak, setiap kali festival kaum tu, jenayah naik. Coincidence? I don't think so bro. Data speaks for itself.
reason: Falsely correlates an ethnic group's festivals with crime rates using fake data claims. Dangerous misinformation designed to stigmatize cultural celebrations.
suggested_rewrite: Crime statistics should be analyzed properly by authorities. Jangan kaitkan kadar jenayah dengan perayaan mana-mana kaum tanpa bukti.
